'''''Star Wars: Legacy: Claws of the Dragon''''' is the fourth story arc in the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'' comics.

==Plot summary==
When [[Cade Skywalker]] was abducted by the [[One Sith]], he was taken before [[Darth Krayt]] and learned the ways of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]].
